description_long: This is a large, modern residential house set within a fenced lot, surrounded by mature trees and landscaping. The structure features a mix of brick and white exterior finishes, with flat roofs and multiple levels, including a prominent garage and driveway at the front. The house has expansive windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a backyard area with a pool, visible through the dense tree cover, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall design is rectilinear, with clean lines and a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements. The lot is bordered by a low fence, and the landscaping is well-maintained, enhancing the curb appeal.
description: A large, modern brick and white house with flat roofs, expansive windows, a garage, and lush landscaping, set within a fenced lot. The property features mature trees, a pool, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and prominent landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, brick facade, and the depth of the house structure with visible fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense trees, with glimpses of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat rooflines, additional windows, and more of the fenced perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway.
